review_title: Excellent platform with ease of use
description: It helps us manage the document / info sharing between the client, our firm and the potential investors. It also allows us to manage users, their permissions etc. It is also helping us managing the analytics on user access. It is easier to upload large size files and share it with intended users which is not possible on outlook due to size limits.
author: Ovais A. S.
pros: Dealroom is easy to use, you can populate dealroom with your due diligence folders and create due diligence list right inside the dealroom instead of sending the due diligence list separately to your clients.
cons: Missing Outlook plugin which is mostly available will update tab that would allow execution team to update status on this would allow execution team to update status on transactions.

description: Great tool for us to share very sizeable documents at a reasonable cost.
author: Mark O.
pros: DealRoom is very easy to set up, upload and share docs on a confidential basis.
cons: There is not a great way to add summary comments or notes to the notification email on new files uploaded. Additionally, the file name gets cut off in the cover email notifications.

description: We haven't tested it in a real project yet, we only set it up and did initial testing and training. [SENSITIVE CONTENT] has been immensely helpful and many thanks to her. I can provide more insights after testing it in a real project.
author: Kinda D.
pros: Dealroom is user friendly and easy to use, it's clear and well structured for M&A processes. However, more work has to be put into the little details that a user has to go through from an operational POV. The general logic., flow, functionality and features are very handy and useful
cons: The little details like not having your own templates, having to import and export, no ability to copy assignees can be annoying .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I enjoyed it over other data rooms when it comes to closing a transactions.
author: Carmen A.
pros: Easy to use when coordinating with multiple parties
cons: Too many email notifications received on a daily basis can cloud what is important.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Uploading documents and making changes are so easy. Any time I use a different VDR I get frustrated.
author: Kris S.
pros: It is much easier to use then most other VDR's I have worked with. The functionality and intuitive features are the best out there.
cons: There are no specific complaints I have with this software. A VDR is supposed to make things easy for us to upload documents in a secure location and Deal Room has solved that problem.

description: Access to a very large cache of documents to be viewed by multiple people across the world
author: Stephen B.
pros: Documents seem to be easily found and easily opened
cons: When I added a request, the other users with access get notified of my request but not me. It is off putting at first as I was not sure that my request had been processed. When an email is received notifying of a new document added to a folder, I tried accessing that via both the document link and the folder link. In each case, it took me some time to work out how to get back to the main menu. There needs to be an clearer and easier path (for first time users) back to the main menu of document folders .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Austin M.
pros: DealRoom was a great platform for a project I recently worked on. It provided timely notifications when new items were uploaded to the site, and it the folder structure was easy to navigate and search.
cons: DealRoom was easy to use and access - I can't think of anything that I didn't like about the platform.

description: We use DealRoom for Due Diligence and Integration Planning. We love that it is permission-based, down to folder within a section. It has been abundantely helpful getting visibility and real-time updates to the team members involved.
author: Lauren F.
pros: It's very user friendly and has a clean UI/UX.
cons: I've sent a product request for a "Checklist" feature to be added.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kelli M.
pros: Intuitive, just like managing folders and documents on my computer. Never had a proble gaining access.
cons: Notifications for each document uploaded coukd be overkill at times, would orefer a daily rollup or a proactive outreach based on the volume of notifications I was getting to ask if I’d like to turn them off.

review_title: Fresh approach to stale VDR platforms
author: Jennifer D.
pros: As strictly an end-user, I appreciate certain features, such as bulk download, sort by recent upload, and the ability to customize notifications.
cons: I wish that there were additional folders that held "New," "New Since," and "Unread" documents.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good. We didn't control the software choice but it was easy to use.
author: Lee S.
pros: This was our first time using DealRoom. Our partner uses this as a secure data portal for sharing sensitive, controlled data. We found it very useful and if we had questions, the support team was very quick to respond, resolve, and confirm we understood why the issue occurred and that we were clear with the explanation. The system was easy to navigate and track usage and updates.
cons: No significant issues. We were a little confused at times when one person on the team reviewed "new" data which caused the "new" flag to fade and others might miss this due to the volume of data shared. A suggestion: retain the "new" flags for one full day and change the color once the entry is initially reviewed (e.g. green moves to yellow) and stays yellow for 24 hours so the team knows it's new but has been reviewed. Not a big thing, just a suggestion.

description: Thoroughly impressed, prefer it over competing products such as intralinks, MerrillDatasite One and even Ansarada. The download and processing speed of the site really stands out to me.
author: Louisa C.
pros: This software has stood out to me for various reasons. - Fast download speed to easy zip folders which have smaller capacity and are therefore easy to email forward. - Loading speed of the pages is considerably faster than other deal platforms. - Q&A function is user friendly and simple with clear indicators to questions being answered and edit/attachment functions.
cons: - It doesn't seem clear to me as to how to attach data room document numbers to the top of the document when downloaded from the site. - The exported excel index does not include the date which documents were unloaded to the data room.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Using the site for M&A transactions, it is easy to keep all relevant parties on the same page.
author: Connor D.
pros: The functionality and intuitiveness of the software are the most important features. The simple yet elegant design makes navigating the site quite easy.
cons: Realizing that there can be vast amounts of data with long pathways, ideally it would be easier to download all files without renaming any of the files.

description: Very positive experience with the product, was very easy and intuitive to use, the ability to tag other users in deliverable objectives was a game changer
author: Brandon R.
pros: The ability to tag other users in outstanding items & exchange comments / notes
cons: At the onset the VDR was a little difficult to user, however once familiar it was very clear / intuitive
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Vidhya B.
pros: Ease of use (navigation); do not require massive training.
cons: None, for my limited use - all desired features were well handled.

description: Seems to perform well for requirements
author: Joe W.
pros: Ease of use once features understood. Set up initially by Atlas Technical Consultants Inc. attn: [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]. You should contact her for her opinion of the data room ease of use, download process etc.
cons: No negative comment the data room features seem to be easy to use.

author: Ian F.
pros: Some deal rooms do not allow you to filter by date and this one does which is very convenient.
cons: Sometimes downloading files with their index number can be an issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great for Large, Complex Deals- Easy to Use
description: Overall, this was a good experience. I am happy to see when DealRoom is used when I am involved in a deal.
author: Tom O.
pros: Love being able to preview documents securely without downloading. Has helped a ton in deals with various entities involved in diligence.
cons: While the product was easy to use, I wonder if they can add functionality to show what you have viewed/downloaded in the past. I found myself clicking around a bit not knowing what I had viewed already.

author: celsi R.
pros: The features most impact are the structures of files and they are use easy.
cons: When files are placed in blocks, we have difficulty downloading them. Sometimes we need to download everything, when we need a single one.
author_profession: gerente de desenvolvimento de Novos Negócios

description: Very nice and usefull. I particularly appreciate to receive alerts when new documents are uploaded.
author: Jérôme L.
pros: Easy to use, very clear file structure, files are easy to donwload
cons: There are no elements that I can see in that area.

author: Michael B.
pros: the ease of use and downloading documents.
cons: dual factor authentication. I prefer the option for an email code instead of text message.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Housing of information relating to transactions
author: Robert R.
pros: User interface is intuitive and easy to navigate - this is important as all competitor products look differently from one another. DealRoom's interface aids in efficiency.
cons: Not offhand - no. It is easy for me to recognize new attachments and updates to the site.

author: Kimber C.
pros: This program works great for our smaller deals and was easy to set up and alter to fit our needs.
cons: Doesn't work well for larger deals with multiple locations.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I work in HR, and there are certain data that needs to be restricted to limited HR folks. The DealRoom feature allowed us to set the access accordingly
author: Hanh P.
pros: user friendly, easy to navigate through documents, access can easily be set accordingly to user's needs
cons: None. I can't think of anything at this time

description: Sharing data with multiple parties and allowing segmented access to select information
author: John G.
pros: Flexibility for organizing and posting data
cons: Changing structures once initial information has been loaded
